overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, starting from a street food stall and proceeding along neon-lit sidewalks past futuristic buildings and holographic advertisements. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with cinematic quality lighting and wet pavement reflections.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a street food stall under an overpass at night. The camera moves past red plastic chairs and a metal counter where a vendor is working. Fluorescent lights illuminate the area as the camera exits the sheltered stall space onto the sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure, the camera moves past a concrete barrier wall on the left. The wet pavement reflects colorful neon signs from surrounding buildings as futuristic vehicles pass by on the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street with hotel and graffiti walls

segments.scene_description: The street curves gently as the camera passes a hotel building on the left and a wall covered in vibrant graffiti. A large green neon arrow sign points the way forward. The overpass structure remains visible to the left while the sidewalk continues alongside the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large holographic advertisement

slowing pace as approaching pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk

concrete bench with person sitting near traffic light pole

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive green holographic billboard on the left. The camera approaches a crosswalk where a pedestrian in a brown coat waits at the curb. Another person sits on a bench nearby as the camera slows, surrounded by towering futuristic buildings covered in neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered intimacy of a street food stall into the expansive, neon-drenched scale of a cyberpunk intersection. It begins under a dark overpass, moving past red plastic chairs and a metal vendor counter before exiting the sheltered space onto a narrow sidewalk. As the camera advances beneath the elevated highway, the environment shifts toward the open street, where wet pavement begins to reflect the vibrant glow of neon signs and passing futuristic vehicles. The scene then curves past a hotel and graffiti-covered walls, guided by a large green neon arrow, while the oppressive concrete of the overpass gradually gives way to a wider urban vista. Finally, the path opens into a massive intersection dominated by a towering green holographic billboard and skyscrapers draped in advertisements, slowing as it approaches pedestrians waiting at a rain-slicked crosswalk.
